panels.title: Library Size
panels.description: Total bytes used by all original assets (admin /server/statistics).

panels.title: Library Growth
panels.description: History starts when Prometheus began scraping (exporter exposes current gauges).

panels.title: Assets by Country (map)
panels.description: Bubble per country at the centroid of that country's own geotagged assets (coords mode — no country-name mapping needed; works for every country). Bubble size/colour = asset count.

panels.title: Assets by City (map)
panels.description: Bubble per city at the centroid of that city's own geotagged assets (coords mode). Bubble size/colour = asset count; unknown-city assets are excluded.

panels.title: Server Info
panels.description: Running Immich version and bundled dependency versions.
